top_signals.title: US Treasury issues new Iran sanctions targeting crypto exchanges - Reuters
top_signals.summary: US Treasury issues new Iran sanctions targeting crypto exchanges  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: DOE awards $67M to ElementUSA, Colorado School of Mines for rare earth processing plant
top_signals.summary: The facility, the company said, has the potential to make the Louisiana residue one of the only depleting bauxite residue waste resources in the world.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Macy's CEO on Earnings, Brand Strategy and Outlook
top_signals.summary: Macy's CEO Tony Spring discusses the company's earnings, consumer spending trends and the outlook for retail sales with Romaine Bostick on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Google adds Android protection against AI deepfake scam calls
top_signals.summary: Google is introducing a new Android security feature that will detect and flag phone calls in which scammers use artificial intelligence to impersonate a user's personal contacts. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Revolut’s US bank to offer stablecoin services alongside FDIC-insured products: Reuters
top_signals.summary: Revolut U.S. CEO Cetin Duransoy told Reuters the company plans to offer access to stablecoins in the United States.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Every single bank will soon need to hold digital assets, says Zodia CEO Julian Sawyer
Glencore restarts Cerrejón after rail blockade
top_signals.summary: Colombia's largest coal mine resumes operations as recurring disruptions continue to threaten output and investment.

top_signals.title: Speech by Commissioner Lahbib to the Committee on Public Health at the European Parliament
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 03 Jun 2026 In the past year, health has continued to make headlines, in Europe and around the world.
The Hantavirus and Ebola outbreaks are clear reminders of the importan...

top_signals.title: Suspect in Tochigi robbery-murder who fled abroad ordered to return passport
top_signals.summary: Kazuhiko Masuda, the suspected orchestrator of a robbery-murder in Tochigi Prefecture, is believed to be in Southeast Asia.

top_signals.title: Carbon Ridge’s Onboard Carbon Capture System Approved by DNV
top_signals.summary: An assessment from global classification society DNV, using its Recommended Practice for performance verification of onboard carbon capture and storage (OCCS), has confirmed Carbon Ridge’s centrifugal onboard carbon capture system can reach CO2 capture rates of as high as 98%.
